I'd also recommend referring to this too

Brown WoDs (for Arc 1 only) 
BiS 

Frenzy - Adds Cursed Relics to the ingame Shops, purchasing a Cursed Relic refunds 15 Black Sigils  

Emerge - Can refund the shop (up to 3 times), each at 0 cost

Gluttony - Reject offers to place Orisons on your Cards to gain a boost in your Max Health (up to 2 times)

Contenders 

Aged - Grants 1000 Keyflare after completing a Battle

Whisper - Grants 50 Aliemus to the Ally with the least Aliemus after completing a Battle  

Epiphany - Grants 1000 Keyflare at the beginning of a Stage, grants 2 Arithmatecia for the first turn of a Boss Battle

Situational

Hope - Recover 5% of loss Health upon discovering a new Tile. After using an Emergency Gnosis, receive 100% Crit Damage + Chance

Vitality - Receive the additional Option to remove up to 3 Symptoms / States in Junctions

Exile - A Symptom / State Card can be sold in Shop instead of your Awakener's Command Cards
Brown WoDs are very overpowered for Arc 1
o/
At the very least, use Frenzy + Emerge somewhere in your Team
my chars for now

What is realm mastery?
A stat that boost the effectiveness of your realm mechanics, e.g make mono chaos team gain more aliemus, make Caro team heal and shield more
Generally you don't build it on your team directly,  but good to grab on relics during a run

I don't get the difference between Quasar and Leap <:Jenkin_think:1459079611131494543>
they work differently in Ultra turn
Leap card proc as normal, but quasar card don't get the quasar effect
Instead they have -1 cost
This is to prevent something like clem to stack 1000 permanent str in one turn with  her quasar in ultra turn
you can do temporary strenght tho, with erica wheel 🐒

He just meant reenact whenever you have the energy

It's just tha the infinite rewards from the shop seem pretty awful
Rose script is always high in demand
Unless it takes the full 14 days to clear the rest of the shop (I haven't done the math), it doesn't look worth it
So you are not at a lost, unless you desperately need other materials
Yeah but interlude gives more rose per stamina than farming the event, at least this first stage
You get 20 stamina back per run though

It's 800 currency x 40 rose per currency = 32k for 100 stamina
Interlude is 20k for 20 stamina, so 100k for 100 stamina

What do people prefer for djewels, +12 free units (already at +4) or +12 wods? I use the free units and the wods in ddive
